use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF CLOSTRIDIOIDES DIFFICILE-ASSOCIATED DIARRHEA (CDAD) IN PATIENTS FROM 6 MONTHS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
1.1 Clostridioides difficile-Associated Diarrhea
DIFICID® is indicated in adult and pediatric patients aged 6 months and older for the treatment of C. difficile-
associated diarrhea (CDAD).
